entity.label: Organization Name
entity.help: Enter a unique name for this Meraki organization.

validators.errorMsg: Maximum length allowed for organization name is 50
Organization Name must begin with a letter and consist exclusively of alphanumeric characters and underscores.

entity.label: Service region
entity.help: Select Service region (Global is preselected)

entity.label: Base URL
entity.help: Enter base url for meraki. eg. https://api.meraki.com

validators.errorMsg: Maximum length allowed for base URL is 120
Enter a valid base URL.

entity.label: Organization ID
entity.help: Enter Organization ID.

validators.errorMsg: Maximum length allowed for ID is 50
Organization ID must consist exclusively of numbers

oauth.label: Client ID
oauth.help: Enter the Meraki App Client ID.

oauth.label: Client Secret
oauth.help: Enter the Meraki App Client Secret.

oauth.label: Redirect URL
oauth.help: Copy and paste this URL into your Meraki App sign-in redirect url.

oauth.label: Scope
oauth.help: Requested scopes from Meraki Web App
oauth.defaultValue: dashboard:general:config:read dashboard:general:telemetry:read wireless:config:read switch:telemetry:read sdwan:telemetry:read dashboard:licensing:config:read camera:config:read sensor:config:read sensor:telemetry:read camera:telemetry:read switch:config:read wireless:telemetry:read dashboard:general:telemetry:write

entity.label: Max API calls per second

validators.errorMsg: The value of Maximum API calls per second should be an integer between 1 and 10.
The value of Maximum API calls per second should be an integer between 1 and 10.

entity.help: Enter maximum api calls per second for the Organization

entity.label: Create inputs automatically?
entity.help: Selecting this option will automatically create inputs for all input types (except Webhook) in disabled mode. The inputs will follow the default naming convention: <input_type>_<account_name>.

entity.label: Index
entity.help: An index is a type of data repository. Select the index in which you want to collect the events.

validators.errorMsg: You shouldn't use internal indexes
Maximum length allowed for index is 80
Maximum length allowed for host is 4096
Maximum length allowed for username is 50
Maximum length allowed for password is 8192

options.saveValidator: function(formData) { if(!formData.proxy_enabled || formData.proxy_enabled === '0') { return true; } if(!formData.proxy_url) { return 'Proxy Host can not be empty'; } if(!formData.proxy_port) { return 'Proxy Port can not be empty'; } return true; }

validators.errorMsg: Log level must be one of: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL

entity.label: Splunk URL with HEC port
entity.help: Enter the Splunk HEC URL e.g., https://splunkhost:8088 for Splunk enterprise or https://http-inputs-example.splunkcloud.com:443 for Splunk cloud.
entity.tooltip: Please make sure that The URL should be using https and have verified SSL certificate to receive data from Cisco Meraki.

validators.errorMsg: Max length allowed for Splunk URL with HEC port length is 4096
Please enter the Splunk URL with HEC port with 'https://'.

entity.label: HEC Input
entity.help: Select the HEC input stanza used for the webhook shared secret.
entity.tooltip: Create or manage HEC inputs under Settings > Data Inputs > HTTP Event Collector, then select the input name here.
